_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: SNP rs4660761 was significant by TRAP analysis in an additive model
details: Identified SNP rs4660761 as significant in additive model with p-value of 0.020 for untransformed CALM and 0.026 for log-transformed CALM
